notes: Excellent execution. All six Tier 1 competitors identified with accurate platform/non-platform classification and tier system explained. Strategic positioning captured all nuances: market-lens feature selection, green-only visual tone, honest comparison philosophy, GitLab row inclusion, platform-gap call-outs, and coopetition approach. Stage-specific mapping clearly articulated with concrete examples (GitHub/CloudBees not on Monitor tab) and the copy-paste error noted. Methodology documented comprehensively with 10 specific decisions including tiered rollout, per-stage filtering, and data/presentation separation. Minor inefficiency: duplicate file created (competitor_analysis.md and competitor_analysis_1.md) when one was requested. Content quality is comprehensive and well-organized.
